ChatGPT Instructions to Digitize and Import your Cemetery Records into EverArk
Cemetery records often date back decades—or even centuries—and many are stored in fragile paper ledgers, index cards, or maps. Over time, these can be lost to fire, water damage, fading ink, or simple deterioration. Digitizing ensures that these irreplaceable records are preserved permanently in a secure format. It protects a cemetery’s heritage and allows future generations to access accurate information about past burials.

ChatGPT Instructions to Map your Cemetery for EverArk
Designing a clean, accurate cemetery plot map is way easier than you think when you use GPS anchors with a little math and code. These instructions, along with our example, will walk you through a practical, simple workflow you can run entirely with ChatGPT: from using your plot GPS anchor points for your cemetery to calculating the coordinates for all plots to exporting the results to a CSV file that you can import and open in EverArk.  Let's get started by following our 5 easy steps!
